allow: Bash(uv pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i openenv || echo "OpenEnv not installed yet")
Bash(uv add openenv_core verifiers fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" pydantic)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import openenv; print\(openenv.__file__\); import os; os.system\('ls -la ' + os.path.dirname\(openenv.__file__\)\)")
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip list | grep openenv)
Bash(python -m openenv.cli --help 2>&1 || ls -la .venv/bin/ | grep openenv || echo "No openenv in bin")
Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/step -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"tool_calls": ["adhd_task_initiation_coach"], "message": "Open the document and type just the title."}')

Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/reset && echo "" && curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/step -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"tool_calls": [], "message": "What do you want to work on?"}')

Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/reset && echo "" && curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/step -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"tool_calls": ["set_timer"], "message": "Let me set a 5 minute timer for you."}')
Bash(kill %1 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "uvicorn server.app" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo "cleaned up")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from huggingface_hub import hf_hub_download
import difflib

files = ['server/adhd_env_environment.py', 'reward.py']
for f in files:
    v1 = hf_hub_download\('TheSteve0/adhd-env', f, repo_type='space', revision='4ffc897b485f'\)
    v2 = hf_hub_download\('TheSteve0/adhd-env', f, repo_type='space', revision='9eb98888ea2b'\)
    with open\(v1\) as fh: v1c = fh.readlines\(\)
    with open\(v2\) as fh: v2c = fh.readlines\(\)
    diff = list\(difflib.unified_diff\(v1c, v2c, fromfile=f'{f} \(working\)', tofile=f'{f} \(broken\)', n=1\)\)
    if diff:
        print\(f'=== {f} ==='\)
        for line in diff:
            print\(line, end=''\)
        print\(\)
    else:
        print\(f'{f}: no changes'\)
")
